You can learn how to

Train Your Dog

1 Minute at a time!

Discover how quick, fun, and easy training can be with
1 Minute Dog Training!

Watch the free videos now

Create a Lasting
Bond with Your Dog!

Learn How to Communicate with Your Dog in a Kind & Effective Way
Train Your Dog in Quick 1 Minute Sessions Throughout Your Busy Day
Unlock the Secrets to Your Dog's Desires and Needs

FAQs About 1 Minute Dog Training

Watch our intro video

It takes hours to train a dog.
The 1 Minute Dog Training is made for busy people, that is why we teach you how to train your dog in 1 minute sessions.
I have to spend lots of money and hire a dog trainer to have a well-behaved dog.
You can learn how to train your dog with the 1 Minute Dog Training.
My dog is old and set in his ways and will never learn.
Even old stubborn dogs can learn with this training method!
I've already tried to train my dog and it didn't work.
The 1 Minute Dog Training will work for you with consistency. Several 1 minute sessions every day will transform your dog! 

Meet the 1 Minute Dog Trainer

TOM MITCHELL

This is me at 2!
This is me today!

Hi! I'm Tom Mitchell the 1 Minute Dog Trainer.

Dogs can be our greatest friends. They live simply, love generously, and care deeply. If we followed their lead, we would run to greet our loved ones the moment they come home, never pass an opportunity for a joyride, and delight in the simple pleasure of a long walk.

But, frustrations often arise when we try to teach them. We snap at the puppy chewing our shoes. We’re mad at our dog who constantly pulls on the leash. We try to train our dogs, but we grow impatient and life gets in the way.

This is why created the 1 Minute Dog Training! I have worked with a variety of animals for over three decades. Wild wolves, aggressive house cats, and Olympic equestrian teams. However, my greatest love is working with puppies and dogs.

After working with many families and their dogs, I discovered the number one reason people did not train their dogs was because people ran out of time. That is why I created the 1 Minute Dog Training Method. As the name suggests this innovative approach teaches short, fun, and focused 1 minute training sessions.

Happy Training,
-Tom Mitchell, The 1 Minute Dog Trainer
Need help training your dog but not sure where to begin?
Take our free quiz to find out how you can get on the right track to help your dog.

"In dog training, consistency matters! The 1 Minute Dog Training method focuses on patience, positive reinforcement, and daily 1 minute sessions. In a world where time is of the essence, all it takes is just 1 minute to make a difference.”

-Tom Mitchell, the 1 Minute Dog Trainer

Video Testimonial from a Happy Client

Emma & Theo's Story

“I recently got a new puppy! I love him and he definitely comes with puppy wildness!

He’s been chewing up everything and biting really hard. I was looking up how to deal with this problem, and I came across these 1 Minute Dog Videos!

I learned about the TTouches and tried them on Theo and they have really transformed him and his biting.“

🐾 Emma & Theo

Watch the free videos now

Video Testimonial from a Happy Client

DeeAnn & Ohia's Story

“With the 1 Minute Dog Training it’s been almost miraculous… just one minute at a time seems to be making some really amazing results.

She has gone from dragging me down the street to being right by my side… It’s been so amazing to see how in just in a few short minutes she can change her behavior so radically.”

🐾 DeeAnn & Ohia

Watch the free videos now
You May Be Scratching Your Head Thinking
"How Can I Train My Dog in Just 1 Minute?"
CONCENTRATION BOOST

Training sessions that run too long often lead to decreased focus and attention from your dog. Short, frequent sessions capture and hold your dog's attention, making the training far more effective.

FREQUENT REINFORCEMENT

With 1 minute training sessions, you're able to reinforce positive behavior multiple times throughout the day, leading to quicker learning and better retention.

STRESS REDUCTION

Short training sessions keep things fun and interesting! Long training sessions can be physically and mentally taxing for both you and your dog, which can lead to stress and frustration.

CONSISTENCY AND ROUTINE

Dogs thrive on consistency and routine. Frequent 1-minute training sessions allow you to build a steady routine and strengthen the bond with your dog, all while cultivating desired behaviors.

INTEGRATION INTO DAILY LIFE

With the 1 minute method, training is a part of your everyday interaction with your dog. This seamless integration leads to more practical learning and better behavior adjustment.

You Can Now Save Time and Train Your Dog Simultaneously!

Do you dream of having a loyal dog who eagerly follows your guidance?

Watch the free videos now

Learn this Simple & Easy Dog Training Method

Got a New Puppy? Dealing with a Non-Stop Barker? Constantly Getting Pulled Down the Street?

No matter what you’re dealing with, please know you’re not alone on this journey!

Whether you just got your first puppy and don’t know where to start or you have a dog that you need help training, we’ve got your back! 

You will learn to start with the life-changing basics of sit, stay, and come.

The 1 Minute Dog Training method provides quick, easy, and kind techniques to get you and your pup living happily together. 

Using this positive training method, you will have a well-behaved pup in no time … all you need is 1 minute!

“The 1 Minute Dog Training System really works! Our dog now comes with ease. We are a busy family so training in 1 minute sessions has really made the world of a difference.”

-Char & Dr. Bill Showalter, MD and Scooby

“I’ve known Tom since the early 1980’s and ever since then Tom has focused on helping people develop a relationship with dogs by promoting an attitude of kindness and gratitude for our canine friends.”

-Linda Tellington-Jones, Founder of the T-Touch

“When my dog Mico was young, he would pull me down the street when we went on walks. After a few 1 minute training sessions, I was amazed that Mico listened and did not pull anymore. I highly recommend the 1 Minute Dog Training!”

-Basha Cohen and Mico

“I had a most positive training experience with the 1 Minute Dog Training! When I took my dog to a local dog training class, they were too rigid and strict. But our work with the 1 minute sessions was perfect….gentle and joyful, but firm. I highly recomment this training method.”

-Linda Reuther and Buffalo

The world's most respected literary review magazine

“Mitchell draws on his decades of experience as a dog trainer to simplify the process in this guide… In brief, colorfully illustrated chapters full of engaging graphics and bulleted text, Mitchell takes the reader through his program.

He broadens his advice to include many training-adjacent subjects, like dog cognition, leash training, nipping and biting, and even the nuances of picking the right food… The foremost strength of the book lies in the inherent compassion underlying all of these micro sessions of training—the assumption (running throughout the book) that dogs are separate, complex beings, far more intelligent and intuitive than most humans give them credit for being.”

Imagine Your Life with a Well Trained Dog

Dogs Can Be Our Greatest Friends

This is why I created the 1 Minute Dog Training.

I have over three decades of hands-on experience with a variety of animals.

From wild wolves to aggressive house cats, and also Olympic equestrian teams.

However, my greatest love is working with puppies and dogs.

After working with many families and their dogs, I discovered that the number one reason that people did not train their dogs was because people ran out of time.

HARMONY AT HOME

Imagine returning from work to a peaceful home, no chewed-up shoes or scratched furniture in sight.
ENJOYABLE WALKS

Imagine going on stress-free walks, with your dog walking peacefully by your side - no more tug-o-war.
RELAXED SOCIAL GATHERINGS

Imagine going on stress-free walks, with your dog walking peacefully by your side - no more tug-o-war.
TRAVEL COMPANIONSHIP

Imagine going on stress-free walks, with your dog walking peacefully by your side - no more tug-o-war.
BONDING AND MUTUAL RESPECT

Visualize a deep, fulfilling relationship with your dog, marked by mutual respect and understanding.

As the name suggests, this innovative training approach teaches short, fun, and focused, 1 minute training sessions.

I discovered with dog training it’s the consistency that matters, not the length of the sessions. The 1 Minute Training focuses on patience, positive reinforcement, and daily 1 minute sessions.

The 1 Minute Dog Training method promises a unique, effective, and kind way to deepen the bond between people and their dogs.

In a world where time is of the essence, I have found that all it takes is just one minute to make a difference.
